projectDescription: An ultra-performant data transformation framework for AI with incremental processing, enabling developers to build and maintain vector indexes, knowledge graphs, and custom pipelines from any data source.
keyFeatures: Incremental processing — only recomputes changed data, minimizing work on source updates
Dataflow programming model with observable data lineage out of the box
High-performance Rust core engine with Python bindings via PyO3
Plug-and-play sources (local files, S3, Google Drive, Postgres, Azure Blob) and targets (Postgres, Qdrant, LanceDB, Neo4j, ChromaDB, Pinecone)
Built-in LLM integrations for text embedding and structured extraction (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, and more)
Live update mode with change-data-capture for continuous index freshness
Custom operation support — extend with your own sources, functions, and targets
CLI for managing, inspecting, and updating indexing flows
publicApiSurface: cocoindex.flow_def — decorator to declare an indexing flow
cocoindex.FlowBuilder.add_source() — import data from a source
cocoindex.DataSlice.transform() — apply a function to a data slice
cocoindex.DataSlice.row() — iterate over rows of a table-typed data slice
cocoindex.DataScope.add_collector() — create a data collector
cocoindex.Collector.collect() — collect fields into the collector
cocoindex.Collector.export() — export collected data to a target
cocoindex.transform_flow — decorator for shared indexing/query transformation logic
cocoindex.Flow.update() / update_async() — one-time update of index
cocoindex.FlowLiveUpdater — continuous live update of index
cocoindex.Flow.setup() / drop() — manage persistent backends
cocoindex.init() — initialize CocoIndex with settings
cocoindex.Settings / DatabaseConnectionSpec — configuration dataclasses
cocoindex.functions.SplitRecursively — chunk text into pieces
cocoindex.functions.SentenceTransformerEmbed — embed text with SentenceTransformers
cocoindex.functions.EmbedText — embed text via LLM APIs
cocoindex.functions.ExtractByLlm — extract structured data via LLM
cocoindex.LlmSpec / LlmApiType — LLM configuration
cocoindex.VectorIndexDef / VectorSimilarityMetric — vector index configuration
cocoindex.sources.LocalFile / AmazonS3 / GoogleDrive / AzureBlob / Postgres — built-in sources
cocoindex.targets.Postgres / Qdrant / LanceDB / Neo4j / ChromaDB / Pinecone — built-in targets
cocoindex.op.function — decorator to implement a custom function
cocoindex.op.executor_class — decorator to implement a stateful custom function
